prestazioni: AMG M177 DE30 AL 3.0L V6 Biturbo (408 HP stock) upgraded with a Weistec Engineering Stage 3+ hybrid turbo kit featuring Garrett GTX4274R turbos (68mm compressor, 74mm turbine) with billet compressor wheels, custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipes, and a Weistec high-flow intercooler (1200g/s airflow capacity) to support 750 HP on 93 octane with a Weistec ECU flash (optimized for 22 PSI boost, 7200 RPM redline, and 11.8:1 AFR targets)

Bilstein Clubsport coilover suspension with 3-way adjustable damping (compression/rebound/height), spherical top mounts, and 8kg/mm front / 12kg/mm rear spring rates, paired with H&R 25mm front and 20mm rear anti-roll bars (W206-specific geometry) for reduced body roll and optimized camber gain (-3.5° front, -2.8° rear)

AP Racing 6-piston front (380mm rotors) and 4-piston rear (356mm rotors) big brake kit with two-piece floating rotors, Pagid RS29 brake pads, and Motul RBF 660 brake fluid (330°C boiling point), complemented by a Cusco 2.5-way mechanical LSD (80% lockup) and a Weistec carbon fiber driveshaft (1.2kg weight reduction, 1200 HP torque capacity)
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (W206-specific) with carbon fiber fenders (30mm front, 40mm rear flares), custom front splitter (3D-printed ABS with 3-stage Gurney flap), and a GT3-style rear diffuser with integrated exhaust cutouts for dual 3.5" titanium exhaust tips (Akrapovič Evolution Line)

OEM+ AMG Night Package II (gloss black) with custom vinyl overlays (3M 2080 Satin Matte Graphite) on the hood, roof, and mirrors, paired with a Vorsteiner V-FF107 forged carbon fiber front lip and rear spoiler (120mm height, 3D-printed airfoil)

BBS FI-R 9.5x19" (ET25) front and 11x19" (ET35) rear wheels with 265/30/19 and 295/25/19 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (custom staggered fitment), wrapped in a custom livery by Foglizzo Designs ("AMG Silver Arrow" theme with hand-painted red pinstripes and matte black accents)
